title: Maa Shailputri Mantra
intro: Read the Maa Shailputri Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Shailputri.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Devi Shailaputryai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Shailaputri.

faq.q1: When should Maa Shailaputri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Shailaputri Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or on the first day of Navratri.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Shailaputri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Shailaputri Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, stability, positive energy, and the blessings of Maa Shailaputri.
faq.q4: Can Maa Shailaputri Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Shailaputri Mantra can be chanted daily with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Shailaputri Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Shailaputri Mantra with faith and devotion.
